description: CompositionPurple tunic top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, has a round neck with a sequinned panel on the front, and gathers that merge into a waistband panel and flare outFittingRegularWash careWash, dry and iron inside outMachine wash delicate at 30 degrees with a mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, wring, tumble dry or dry cleanDry flat in shadeCool iron, but do not iron on print or embroideryUpdate your party style with thispurple tunic top from jealous 21. The sequinned panel on the front adds a dash of bling, while the soft design accentuates your figure. Team this with leggins or black stockings and heels for a really fun party look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in tunic topsHeight: 5'8", Chest: 33"
